key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to fetch usage data, in seconds (60-3600).

key.name: display-mode
key.description: How to display usage in the panel: text, bar, or both.

key.name: show-provider-icon
key.description: Whether to show provider icons in the top bar.

key.name: icon-style
key.description: Icon rendering style: color or monochrome.

key.name: accounts-json
key.description: JSON array of account objects: [{id, provider, name, config}].

key.name: visible-account-ids
key.description: List of account IDs to display in the panel and menu.

key.name: proxy-url
key.description: Optional HTTP proxy URL for API requests. Leave empty for direct connection.
